name: zerogravitynky/membership-tier
title: ZG Membership Tier
description: Full memberships section — left copy + 3 configurable tier cards. Edit all content in the Settings panel.

sectionBody.default: Unlock exclusive member pricing, priority booking, and monthly treatment credits with a Zero Gravity membership. The most cost-effective way to maintain beautiful, healthy skin year-round.

perks.default:
Monthly treatment credits applied automatically
Priority scheduling — always first in line
Exclusive member-only pricing on all services
Access to member events and early promotions

tier1Desc.default: Monthly facials, skincare treatments, and priority aesthetic services at member rates.

tier2Desc.default: IV therapies, wellness visits, and weight loss support with monthly credits and discounted add-ons.

tier3Desc.default: The full ZG experience — unlimited access to aesthetic and wellness services, first-call priority, and exclusive VIP events.
